appearance.breed: 三花貓（白底橘黑三色短毛貓）
appearance.body: 小巧圓潤，行動輕快，尾巴總是開心地翹著
appearance.face: 白色的臉，左眼上方有一塊橘色斑，右耳是黑色的，左右不對稱的花色特別可愛
appearance.fur_pattern: 白色為底，身上分布大塊的橘色與黑色斑塊，背上像披了一件拼布小外套
distinctive_features: 左眼上方有一塊橘色斑，像畫了單邊眼影
右耳整隻是黑色，左耳是橘色
背上有橘黑相間的大斑塊，像拼布外套
尾巴是橘黑相間的環紋
溫暖的淺琥珀色圓眼睛
粉紅色的小鼻子和肉球

quirks: 看到有人聚在一起就要擠進去中間
被稱讚會開心地原地轉圈
喜歡收集亮晶晶的小東西藏在窩裡
personality.voice: 甜甜的短音喵，像小鈴鐺

visual_prompt_snippet: [IDENTITY CARD] Huahua — a small, round calico shorthair with a clean white #FFFFFF base coat and bold patches: LEFT ear orange #E8853A, RIGHT ear black #1A1A1A, one orange patch above the LEFT eye like one-sided eyeshadow, large orange-and-black patchwork saddle across the back like a quilted jacket, and an orange-black ringed tail. Face otherwise white. Eyes: round, warm light-amber #D9A441. Pink nose and paw pads. Cheerful upright tail, light bouncy steps. Expression: bright, friendly, a little scatterbrained. [HARD CONSTRAINTS] 1) Calico tri-color ONLY: white base + orange + black patches. 2) LEFT ear orange, RIGHT ear black, orange patch above LEFT eye — keep this exact asymmetry. 3) Light-amber #D9A441 eyes ONLY — NEVER blue or green. 4) Shorthair, NEVER long or fluffy. 5) Legs and belly stay mostly white. 6) No collar or accessories. End.
negative_prompt: solid color cat, tabby-only stripes, all-orange cat, all-black cat, tuxedo pattern, grey patches, blue eyes, green eyes, longhair, fluffy coat, symmetrical face patches, both ears same color, collar, necklace, bandana, bell, anthropomorphic cat, cat with human body, cat with human hands, cat standing upright like a person, humanoid cat, furry character, catboy, mascot costume, cat wearing full human clothing, cat with human face
story_context: 花花是傳說中會帶來好運的三花貓，老街上的店家都相信這件事——因為牠在誰家門口打盹，那天生意就特別好。花花自己倒不知道什麼是好運，牠只知道哪裡熱鬧就要去哪裡，哪裡有人笑就要擠到中間。也許好運的秘密很簡單：牠走到哪，大家就在哪裡笑。

seasonal_variants.spring: 在花市的攤位間穿梭，身上沾著花瓣
seasonal_variants.summer: 趴在廟口的石階上，跟著風鈴聲搖尾巴
seasonal_variants.autumn: 在曬柿子的竹篩旁打盹，毛色和柿子一樣暖
seasonal_variants.winter: 窩在雜貨店的暖爐邊，聽老闆講古
